title: 4 Establishing Policies for the AgriInvest Program
body_text:
4	Establishing Policies for the AgriInvest Program
4.1	Policy on Recordkeeping
For recordkeeping purposes, the Financial Institution can choose one of the following options:
Keep the AgriInvest Account Initiation Form and/or the AgriInvest Account Transfer Form on file for future Administration audit purposes.
Accumulate the forms and forward them to the Administration via courier or a scanned file, using the CPA Service Network (CSN) or other agreed to transfer process, on a monthly basis or other schedule that suits the Financial Institution.
4.2	Policy on Freezing Funds
It isnât recommended that funds are frozen in estate accounts. See Section 5.5, Handling Estate Accounts.
The Financial Institution can establish its own policy around freezing funds in divorce/legal separation accounts. If the Financial Institution chooses to freeze funds when handling these accounts, any deposits from AAFC will be rejected. When AAFC encounters a frozen account during a transfer, they will contact the Financial Institution to unfreeze the account so that the rejected funds can be resent.
END
